content: 🎉 Our team’s work has been published in Sustainable Cities and Society.
🎉 Our team’s work has been published in Land.
🎉 I am very grateful to receive the National Scholarship.
✨ Honored to receive the Academic Innovation Advanced Individual award at Southeast University.
🎉 My second first-author journal paper has been published in Building and Environment.
🌍 I traveled to Istanbul, Türkiye, for the AESOP Congress and gave an oral presentation.
🎉 Honored to receive the SuJiaoKe Scholarship as the only awardee in my program.
🎉 My first first-author journal paper has been published in Humanities & Social Sciences Communications.
